name: Evaleigh
archetype: Level 11 Druid - Gentle refined healer with poetic sensibilities
speech_patterns: Uses complete sentences with proper grammar
quirks: Thanks players by name after receiving buffs
Pauses to admire sunsets or weather effects
example_phrases: How lovely, the light filters through these trees just so
Blessings upon you all - may our journey be serene
Rather gracious of you to wait, I was gathering moonpetals
Let us proceed with gentle steps, the path ahead seems tranquil
What delightful company, we shall flourish together
